description_long: This storage box features a rectangular, open-top design with dark brown wooden panels forming the main body and thick, light gray concrete or stone corner supports. The wood grain is visible, giving it a natural, robust appearance, while the concrete sides add structural strength and a modern urban aesthetic. Two opposing sides have cut-out handholds for easy lifting and carrying, integrated into the wood panels. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for storing various items such as tools, recyclables, or garden supplies. The box's construction suggests durability for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments, such as sidewalks, parks, or garages. The surfaces are matte and slightly textured, with no visible lid or locking mechanism.
description: A robust, open-top storage box with dark wood panels and thick gray concrete corner supports, featuring cut-out handholds for carrying. Its design is durable and suitable for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: The box is seen from the side, showing a solid dark wood panel framed by two thick gray concrete supports, with no visible handholds.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front, displaying a wood panel with a rectangular cut-out handhold and concrete side supports.
description_view_2: The opposite side mirrors view 0, with a solid wood panel and concrete supports, lacking handholds.
description_view_3: The back view matches the front, showing a wood panel with a cut-out handhold and concrete supports.
attribute_handle_design: integrated cut-out handholds on two opposing wood panels
